title: Heart of the North
writer: Lee Katz, Vincent Sherman, William Byron Mowery
actors: Dick Foran, Gloria Dickson, Gale Page
plot: Cpl. Jim of the R.C.M.P. is taking his daughter Julie to school in Edmonton on the Arctic Queen. Six men hold up the boat when they stop for wood and gun down Jim in front of his daughter. The new inspector sends Alan after them, ...
